items.name: Protein Oats
items.description: Apple fiber, cinnamon, protein, topped with granola, banana, strawberries, blueberries, and almonds.

items.name: Caramel Apple Cheesecake
items.description: Caramel apple cheesecake features creamy cheesecake infused with Granny Smith apple chunks, wrapped in caramel, and topped with a baked streusel and caramel drizzle.

items.name: Protein Donuts
items.description: Protein donuts typically made with almond flour, featuring a variety of toppings like nuts, fruits, and chocolate, providing a protein-rich treat.

items.name: Mocha
items.description: Rich chocolate donut infused with coffee flavor, topped with a swirl of whipped cream and a sprinkle of cocoa powder.

items.name: Blueberry
items.description: A protein donut made with blueberry dough, typically featuring a light glaze for added sweetness.

items.name: Red Velvet
items.description: A red velvet donut typically features a moist cake base with a hint of cocoa, topped with a smooth cream cheese glaze.

items.name: Protein Waffle
items.description: No flour protein waffles made with egg whites, wholesome oats, and plant-based protein for a clean, satisfying boost. Naturally sweet and served with fresh bananas, strawberries, and blueberries. Finished with optional light drizzles of Nutella, caramel, or chocolate.

items.name: Egg Muffin
items.description: Contains Parmesan cheese, ricotta cheese, bell peppers, spinach, and onion.
